name: Chelsea Clinton
subject: Before Iowa, make sure my mom knows
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Hillary for America, a campaign supported by hundreds of thousands of grassroots donors
body:
What I'm inspired by | Friend --

Campaigns test candidates -- their endurance, their commitment, their values -- and watching my mom on the trail over the past nine months reinforces something I've known since I was small: She's the best leader we could hope for.

I am inspired by the remarkable team supporting my mom and what we've been able to accomplish, but we're about to face one of our biggest tests yet. Now's the time to remind her that you're with her.

**Will you donate $1 before Iowa and show my mom you're willing to do whatever it takes to help her out?**

name: Rand Paul
subject: We are ready
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Rand Paul for President
body:
Dear Patriot,
Today is the day.

Iowa will choose their candidate - and I want
it to be me.

I've been all over Iowa the past few weeks
and I can see the momentum building for this campaign.

The crowds are growing bigger at every stop.
My campaign headquarters are buzzing with excitement.

Patriot, I believe we're set for a solid
finish -- but I'm counting on your most generous contribution of
$50, $25 or even $10 to help me get out the vote in Iowa and next
week in New Hampshire.

Turn out will be absolutely critical and
we're working till the last second.

Campaigns that have top-notch organizations
will have the leg up.

That's why, from day one of this campaign,
I've focused on building a campaign organization that's the envy
of the presidential field.

We are ready.

But I'm counting on you.

Will you please agree to your most generous
contribution of $50, $25 or even $10 right away to help my
campaign's get out the vote operations?

Every dollar you can do will help. Just
please act IMMEDIATELY.

In liberty,
Rand Paul

name: Ben Carson
subject: "Trump couple turns to Carson"
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Carson America, Inc
body:
---
| |
---

Peter,

Here's a new headline from today's _Des Moines Register_ , Iowa's largest newspaper:

_**Trump couple turns to Carson for "intelligence, non-combativeness"**_

The story refers to a married couple from around Dubuque, Terry and Jane Jackson, who saw me for the first time just 30 hours before the caucuses. Mrs. Jackson said of me, "(Carson) said he doesn't like complaining unless he's got a solution. He actually answers question."

**I share this story to make a simple but important point -- many voters in Iowa are still undecided and will not even make up their minds until the caucuses begin at 7pm CT.**

That's why today, until the last possible second, we're working not only to turn out our supporters, but to persuade those who have yet to choose a candidate.

Every donation we receive before 7pm CT will help us finish as strongly as possible. We want to win, and we want every pundit that has written us off to say, "How did we not see this?"

[**Will you make a donation of just $2 right now?**](http://email.bencarson.com/ct/33248599:sS7z_RyBN:m:1:876315805:E4FD7B8530D2EF1F95EDB7F1CCC25A90:r)**It will be a huge help to our staff and volunteers spread throughout Iowa. It will also help to ensure that once we close out the night, we'll have the resources necessary to move onto the next early-voting states.

**
[](http://email.bencarson.com/ct/33248599:sS7z_RyBN:m:1:876315805:E4FD7B8530D2EF1F95EDB7F1CCC25A90:r)
---

We were never supposed to get this far. The political class never gave us a shot. Because I don't have a political title before my name, they didn't even think I should run.

But I'll tell you what -- while I may not be a politician, I've had to make more life-and-death decisions than anyone in this race. I made these decisions without rhetoric or vitriol, but through a calm, thorough and systematic process for a single purpose -- saving lives.

As your next President, that's the type of leadership I will bring to the Oval Office.
**[Peter, there are many other Terry and Jane Jacksons throughout Iowa, and your donation of $2 right now will help us reach them before the clock runs out at 7pm CT.](http://email.bencarson.com/ct/33248599:sS7z_RyBN:m:1:876315805:E4FD7B8530D2EF1F95EDB7F1CCC25A90:r)**

Thank you for your steadfast support. It's an honor to have you on my team.

Sincerely,

Ben Carson

| | | [](http://email.bencarson.com/ct/33248599:sS7z_RyBN:m:1:876315805:E4FD7B8530D2EF1F95EDB7F1CCC25A90:r) [](http://email.bencarson.com/ct/33248600:sS7z_RyBN:m:1:876315805:E4FD7B8530D2EF1F95EDB7F1CCC25A90:r)

name: Rand Paul
subject: Poised to shock
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Rand Paul for President
body:
Dear Patriot,
Brand new polls out this morning are all over
the map.

And the Washington Post is reporting, "Many
Iowans won't decide until today whom to vote for."

With just hours left until the caucuses
begin, it's a horse-race to the finish.

I'm in this race to win. I believe we're
going to shock people in Iowa.

And I'm counting on your most generous
contribution of $50, $25 or even $10 to help my campaign's
last-minute get out the vote operations.

Patriot, in today's world where most
Americans now use cell phones, the polling industry has struggled
to adapt.

But there's always been three things polls
don't capture. They don't measure energy. They don't measure
who is going to show up. And they don't measure the strength of
a candidate's organization.

My campaign is the envy of the entire field
when it comes to organization and the passion of our supporters.

Now, just hours from now, the world will see
the impact you and I can make together.

But we have to turn out our vote.

Will you please agree to your most generous
contribution of $50, $25 or even $10 to help my campaign's get
out the vote efforts right away?

In liberty,
Rand Paul

name: Adam Parkhomenko, HillaryClinton.com
subject: So... I need to borrow your couch
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Hillary for America, a campaign supported by hundreds of thousands of grassroots donors
body:
I promise it's for a good cause | Friend --

You know that space you reserve for out-of-town guests? That spare room, that couch, that air mattress on the living room floor? Here’s a thought: How about using that space to help elect Hillary here in Virginia?

A whole wave of folks will come here between now and the end of the primary to make sure we secure a win for Hillary, and we need your help to house them. **[Sign up to host a volunteer for a day or longer!](http://links.hillaryclinton.com/ctt?kn=10&ms=MjQ2MDY2NDcS1&r=MTA3MzIzMDg3NjIwS0&b=0&j=NzQwMDI0MjA3S0&mt=1&rt=0)**

I can tell you a few things about these folks: They’re huge Hillary supporters (so you have something in common!), they’re going to be pretty busy getting the vote out, and they’ll be incredibly grateful to have a place to crash at the end of a long day of volunteering.

And I know they’ll appreciate seeing the friendly face of a fellow Hillary supporter like you.

**What do you say? Sign up today to host an out-of-town volunteer, and an organizer will be in touch with all the details you'll need:**

[ | | [**I've got room!**](http://links.hillaryclinton.com/ctt?kn=1&ms=MjQ2MDY2NDcS1&r=MTA3MzIzMDg3NjIwS0&b=0&j=NzQwMDI0MjA3S0&mt=1&rt=0)
--- ](http://links.hillaryclinton.com/ctt?kn=1&ms=MjQ2MDY2NDcS1&r=MTA3MzIzMDg3NjIwS0&b=0&j=NzQwMDI0MjA3S0&mt=1&rt=0)
Thanks!

Adam

Adam Parkhomenko
Director of Grassroots Engagement
Hillary for America

| | | | Peter, Marco and I just stopped by our Iowa field headquarters, and I wanted to give you a quick update from the road. Peter, there's something special in the air today in Iowa: We have a historically important caucus tonight and the support for Marco is growing by the hour.
Day by day, more and more Americans and Iowans are understanding that Marco is the best candidate to defeat Hillary. They have seen him campaign across the state and know that he is as genuine and authentic as they come. He is not a career politician, nor is he running to climb some sort of social ladder.

Peter, that kind of dedication is rare. It takes a unique leader to rally behind like that, and that's exactly what and who Marco is.

name: Rick Santorum
subject: Friend, you choose…
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Santorum for President 2016 This email was sent to [dpwillis67@gmail
body:
| Friend,this is your choice! Please don’t let the media elites & Republican establishment decide this race!

The media is blatantly trying to shut out the American voter in the process to choose the next President. Day after day, they try to determine this election before even one vote has been cast! But, it’s not their choice to make. It’s yours. And ** _you_** can stop their effort to take the American voter out of the process!

[**Friend, your donation of$25 is the fuel that will defeat the media’s bias.**](http://www.ricksantorum.com/r?u=https%3A%2F%2Fcauses.anedot.com%2Fsantorum2016%3Fsc%3Diowa_day&e=84b355b85f9e9360b9dac4e2a50bbee5&utm_source=santorum&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=iowa_day&n=1) Today, Iowans will begin the process of voting for the next President of the United States. And we are locked in a tough race. Honestly, it’s been made even tougher by the mainstream media bias. The real issues facing this country merit real actions — not ratings wars & entertainment-based political coverage. This country needs a leader in the White House who will solve the serious issues of our time. Who will defeat ISIS. Protect us from Iran. Fight for American families, American workers and the unborn. Someone who has a proven record, because the Presidency isn’t an entry-level position. Right now, we have a President who has been the most divisive President in my lifetime. He personally attacks people. He tears them down. He’s untrustworthy. And he doesn’t work with us to solve the real issues facing this country. Hillary Clinton & her friends in the media would have us believe that the greatest threat facing this country is climate change! Not ISIS, not the heavy burdens being levied on American families or an out of control government that is drowning us in debt. Not even Iran’s nuclear advancements that have been made even more possible with the help of Obama’s recent deal. **I will change that!** Friend, I have been fighting for decades against these liberal policies. I have taken on Hillary Clinton...AND WON! I fought the pro-abortion lobby and banned partial-birth abortions. I put sanctions on Syria and I’ve been a strong voice in the fight against ISIS. I overhauled welfare and put millions of Americans back to work. I have what it takes to define & defeat our greatest enemies. And, I have the proven track record of success in going up against the liberal machine in Washington, DC & taking on the mainstream media...and winning! **I’m ready to lead on day one.** As President of the United States, I will create jobs by making America the number one country for manufacturing, again. I will put into place an immigration policy that puts the American worker first! I will fight for the unborn & elevate the policies of this government to respect all life. And I will defeat the greatest threat this country is facing – ISIS. I am not asking for your support based upon my words or clever ads, but based upon the results of my decades of action. I have been and will continue to be the leader that listens to you, represents you, fights for you and wins for you! **But, I can’t do this without you!** [**_Friend, I need your support. Will you give $30, $50, $100 or more to power us over the top?_**](http://www.ricksantorum.com/r?u=https%3A%2F%2Fcauses.anedot.com%2Fsantorum2016%3Fsc%3Diowa_day&e=84b355b85f9e9360b9dac4e2a50bbee5&utm_source=santorum&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=iowa_day&n=2)
You are the one with the power to overcome the media’s assault against us. And, together, we will take back our country! God Bless, Rick _P.S. Friend, if you believe in our cause and our fight, will you share this message with 10 of your friends, family and community members? You see, you are the difference maker in this race. And I’m proud to be on**your** side._

---

This campaign is powered by grassroots supporters like you, so if you have any thoughts on anything at all, [click here](http://www.ricksantorum.com/contact?e=84b355b85f9e9360b9dac4e2a50bbee5&utm_source=santorum&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=iowa_day&n=3) and let us know. We believe that email is one of the best ways to stay in touch with our supporters, but you can [click here if you would like to unsubscribe](http://www.ricksantorum.com/unsubscribe?e=84b355b85f9e9360b9dac4e2a50bbee5&utm_source=santorum&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=iowa_day&n=4) from these messages.

If you’re not interested in continuing to receive email updates, there are other ways to stay involved. You can follow our campaign on [Facebook](http://www.ricksantorum.com/r?u=http%3A%2F%2Ffacebook.com%2Fricksantorum&e=84b355b85f9e9360b9dac4e2a50bbee5&utm_source=santorum&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=iowa_day&n=5), [Twitter](http://www.ricksantorum.com/r?u=http%3A%2F%2Ftwitter.com%2Fricksantorum&e=84b355b85f9e9360b9dac4e2a50bbee5&utm_source=santorum&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=iowa_day&n=6), or [Instagram](http://www.ricksantorum.com/r?u=http%3A%2F%2Finstagram.com%2Fricksantorum&e=84b355b85f9e9360b9dac4e2a50bbee5&utm_source=santorum&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=iowa_day&n=7).

**Thank you so much for everything you’re doing to help us reclaim the American Dream for hardworking families.**

Santorum for President 2016, PO Box 238, Verona, PA 15147

subject: How soon they forget
body:
[](http://action.joesestak.com/page/m/1719190/3476a20e/c40a28a/2744c221/3081777391/VEsH/ "http://joesestak.com")
---

Peter, After voting to send me and my sailors to war as a Congressman, **Pat Toomey visited my aircraft carrier battle group as we were striking Iraq and thanked my sailors for their service (see photo below).** _**Then Pat came home and voted against every annual VA funding bill until the backlog scandal hit the VA.**_ Not only that, but he also voted against standalone bills that would have helped veterans, like the Veterans Jobs Act as well as the Veterans Health and Benefits Bill. | [](http://action.joesestak.com/page/m/1719190/3476a20e/c40a28a/2744c220/3081777391/VEsE/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/admiraljoesestak-web?refcode=16EM0201FBb1&amounts=25,50,100,250,500,1000,2700")
---
[](http://action.joesestak.com/page/m/1719190/3476a20e/c40a28a/2744c22f/3081777391/VEsF/ "http://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/admiraljoesestak-web?refcode=16EM0201FBg1&amounts=25,50,100,250,500,1000,2700")
---
I am running for U.S. Senate because I believe in accountable leadership - a willingness to be held accountable not for what you say, but for what you do. Pat Toomey said he would take care of my sailors, but he came home and voted against them.
I will hold Pat Toomey accountable for his votes, but I can only do so with your help. **Please contribute today, and then _read the AP article below_ about Toomey's voting record on veterans.**
[](http://action.joesestak.com/page/m/1719190/3476a20e/c40a28a/2744c22e/3081777391/VEsC/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/admiraljoesestak-web?refcode=16EM0201FBb2&amounts=25,50,100,250,500,1000,2700")
---

**Toomey 's tall task: Defending voting ****record this time****around**
MARC LEVY, Associated Press, January 31, 2016
HARRISBURG -- Former Navy vice admiral Joe Sestak tells a punchy story on the campaign trail about the voting record of Pat Toomey, the incumbent he wants to beat in Pennsylvania's important U.S. Senate election this year.
In 2002, as a congressman from the Allentown area, Toomey visited the USS George Washington aircraft carrier battle group that Sestak commanded while Navy warplanes bombed Afghanistan.
Toomey, Sestak told a luncheon crowd in Harrisburg last week, "voted to send me to war, visited me on the aircraft carrier as we were bombing away ... and then came home and voted against every veterans appropriations bill."
It's only part of the story. But it underscores the fact that Toomey's voting record over the last five years is being closely scrutinized as Democrats try to convince voters that the Republican senator went against their interests, time and time again.
Toomey contends that he works capably with Democrats, despite his conservative voting record. His campaign also notes that the senator voted for some veterans affairs funding bills, contrary to Sestak's claim.
The election -- and perhaps control of the U.S. Senate -- could hinge on Toomey's ability to defend his voting record, a task made more difficult by the political mechanics of lawmaking.
Toomey narrowly won the seat in 2010 while aggressively attacking Sestak's votes during his two terms as a U.S. House member from suburban Philadelphia. This year, the winner of a three-way Democratic primary race -- Sestak, John Fetterman or Katie McGinty -- will have Toomey's much longer, and still evolving, voting record to pick apart.
According to information supplied by the Sestak and Toomey campaigns, it appears that Toomey subsequently voted "no" on every major veterans affairs funding bill until he left the U.S. House in early 2005. That does not count resolutions Toomey supported that continued the same level of funding or supplemental funding bills that settled up end-of-year costs.
His Senate record is more complicated.
At a time when agency appropriations bills get wrapped up into larger, more complex appropriations bills to finance the federal government, Toomey has voted "no" on most of them.
In 2011 and 2015, he voted with every Democratic senator to support a stand-alone veterans affairs appropriations bill. Those bill versions never became law, and Toomey later voted against the broader, catch-all appropriations bill that folded in veterans affairs dollars, including one in December.
Last month's vote was against what Toomey called a bloated measure "that was crafted behind closed doors, is filled with special interest giveaways and will continue Washington's addiction to overspending and fiscal irresponsibility."
In 2014, Toomey supported the catch-all appropriations bill, as did most Democrats. Toomey called that $1.1 trillion bill "far from perfect," but also praised it for being fiscally conservative -- it locked in spending levels negotiated in prior years between Republicans and Democrats -- and for achieving several policy triumphs, including boosting aid to the federal Veterans Employment and Training Service.
Asked later about Sestak's statement, Sestak's campaign said Toomey had voted against every major veterans' appropriations bill that became law until the VA health care scandal hit in 2014.
With an estimated 940,000 veterans living in Pennsylvania, a strong record on veterans funding could be important.
Meanwhile, the Democrats' attack on Toomey's voting record is intensifying, even as Toomey awaits the result of the April 26 primary election to find out which Democrat will run against him.
The man Toomey replaced in the Senate, the late Arlen Specter, once suggested that a voting record can be made to tell any story.
"You can pick at 10,000 votes, you can find a lot of votes to support most any proposition," Specter told The Associated Press while running unsuccessfully for re-election in 2010.
Christopher Borick, a pollster and political science professor at Muhlenberg College in Allentown, said incumbents may have lots of advantages, but defending a voting record is a particular soft spot. The onus is on Toomey to explain his voting record, Borick said, and provide context to voters who are unlikely to understand how Washington works.
"It becomes this tough territory to defend because you have to show the reasons why you voted against something that had a component that was probably very popular with voters," Borick said. "It is a staple of negative ads and negative charges against incumbents. It's used over and over because it's so simple."

No matter what happens tonight at the Iowa caucus -- win or lose, by a lot or a little -- know that the most important story will be about you.
If you are in Iowa right now, please close this email and start knocking on doors to bring folks out to the caucus tonight.
If you're not in Iowa, you can show the incredible strength of our campaign by proving to the political establishment that **our campaign's supporters can carry us through to the nomination, the general election, and the White House**.
We will be in touch after we know today's caucus results, and you'll hear more from us tonight.
[**Until then, you can be a part of today's incredible momentum by making a $3 contribution to our campaign.**](https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/dont-underestimate-us?refcode=em160201-full "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/dont-underestimate-us?refcode=em160201-full")
Real change has always come from the bottom up. We are only here today because millions of Americans have stood up and said that ENOUGH is ENOUGH. If we stand together and demand this country works for all of us rather than the few, we will transform America.
People should not underestimate us. Thank you for all you do.
In solidarity,
Jeff Weaver

name: Chris Van Hollen
subject: let's not go backwards
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Van Hollen for US Senate
body:
| Dear Friend,

The Republicans have voted 62 times to overturn the Affordable Care Act. The last time was the first time they managed to get the bill to the President's desk -- and President Obama vetoed it. Tomorrow I will proudly lead the debate in Congress to prevent the Republicans from overriding the President's veto and overturning the Affordable Care Act.

It's time we demand a stop to this outrageous effort to try to take health care away from the millions who have benefited from the passage of this historic legislation.

**[Will you join with me and demand Republican leaders end the partisan grandstanding and focus their energies on moving this country forward?](http://action.vanhollen.org/page/m/2de91ce1/70cdc2ba/47c50dbf/3965704/2248420897/VEsH/ "http://action.vanhollen.org/page/s/demand-republicans-end-their-political-games?&utm_medium=email&utm_source=cvanhollen&utm_content=1+-+Will+you+join+with+me+and+demand+Republi&utm_campaign=em2116&source=em2116")**

Almost 18 million Americans have gained access to health care coverage since the passage of ACA and the uninsured rate has dropped to an all-time low.

These important achievements must be protected and expanded. We need to work harder than ever to ensure we have a Democratic majority in the Senate in 2016 that can block future attempts to dismantle ACA.

**[Add your voice and call on Speaker Ryan to stop playing games with people's health care and get serious about solving problems](http://action.vanhollen.org/page/m/2de91ce1/70cdc2ba/47c50dbf/3965705/2248420897/VEsE/ "http://action.vanhollen.org/page/s/demand-republicans-end-their-political-games?&utm_medium=email&utm_source=cvanhollen&utm_content=2+-+Add+your+voice+and+call+on+Speaker+Ryan+&utm_campaign=em2116&source=em2116")**.

We all know that good health is the key to anything else in life. We've made great strides. Let's not go backwards. Americans are depending on us.

Thanks,

Chris
---
